GRC.engineering Companion
Cards Install Roadmap GitHub

What is coming next

Roadmap

The Companion ships in waves. Below is what is shipping next and what is planned. Suggestions are open via GitHub Issues.

Shipping shipping

  • 5 new install paths: ChatGPT, Gemini Gems, Claude Cowork, Notion Custom Agent, Microsoft 365 Copilot
  • Sample artefact pack: synthetic vendor questionnaire, audit walkthrough, policy draft, control review
  • Hero platform panel
  • Play-at-home callout
  • This roadmap page

Planned planned

  • Perplexity Spaces adapter
  • GitHub Copilot custom agent for developer-adjacent practitioners
  • PAI Pack for Daniel Miessler's Personal AI Infrastructure
  • Voice profile wizard to speak your role, environment, frameworks, and goals
  • Update mechanism to keep installed bundles fresh as the corpus grows
  • Wave 2 corpus from the remaining 300k words of source
  • Video demos for each install path
  • Notion MCP integration so installs can pull a learner's Notion content as material

Building building

Intentionally empty.

Contribute

Suggest something

Open an issue with the platform, workflow, or learning surface you want next.

Suggest something ->
Cards / Install / View the repo

Roadmap items are directional until they ship.
